when: reading and writing the task workspace is in scope
purpose: Resolve the Obsidian vault and perform bounded verified task-artifact I/O

when: research must persist a compact handoff and iteration event
purpose: Write and re-read only the task index, research projection, and one event
Locate bounded task, source, and test candidates
Find exact terms and bounded source evidence
Trace callers, consumers, and relationships without broad reads

when: remote review, issue, repository, or current documentation is in scope
purpose: Read source material through an already available provider

when: version-sensitive API, framework, CLI, or protocol behavior is in scope
purpose: Verify current authoritative behavior instead of guessing

when: recent history or provenance materially affects the task
purpose: Inspect bounded local history as evidence
